description: List geometry information. If a geometry set is not specified via the set keyword and no other keywords are specified then information about all geometry sets is listed. Otherwise, if no set is specified then information about the current geometry set is listed.

keywords.name: polygons
keywords.description: List of edge information for the specified or current geometry set. List the extra variable at index i . List group information. An optional slot can be specified. List groups and extras for the edges. List polygon information of the associated edges.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: List of all information about the specified or current geometry set.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: List of node information for the specified or current geometry set. List edge information of the nodes. List the extra variable at index i . List group information. An optional slot can be specified. List groups and extras for the nodes.

keywords.name: nodes
keywords.description: List of polygon information for the specified or current geometry set. List edge information of the associated nodes. List the extra variable at index i . List group information. An optional slot can be specified. List groups and extras for the nodes. List groups and extras for the nodes.

keywords.name: set
keywords.description: List point, edge, and polygon count for the geometry set s .
